codeReview.summary: The implementation adds the Comparison section to the VitePress sidebar config. The change is minimal (7 lines added) and syntactically correct. All five required sidebar sections are present: Getting Started, Guides, API Reference, Internals, Comparison. Nav header includes logo and GitHub link. Mobile sidebar toggle is handled natively by VitePress. No blocking issues found in the code itself.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure (docs-worker/SKILL.md) specifies Step 5: Test Locally - run `bun run docs:dev`, open browser, and verify page renders, navigation works, no console errors, and mobile responsive. The worker skipped all interactive checks and only ran `docs:build` (Step 4). The handoff shows `interactiveChecks: []` despite VAL-NAV-001 through VAL-NAV-004 requiring visual verification (screenshots) of sidebar rendering, navigation, header, and mobile toggle. The skill's own example handoff shows populated `interactiveChecks` array, but the worker's handoff had an empty one.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows only Step 1-4 were executed. Handoff shows `interactiveChecks: []`. Skill step 5 requires: 'Open http://localhost:5173 in browser. Verify: Page renders, Navigation works, No console errors, Mobile responsive'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker reported `validatorsPassed: true` in EndFeatureRun, but no validators were executed - only a build command was run. This is misleading; the build succeeding does not validate the UI behavior described in VAL-NAV-001 through VAL-NAV-004.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff `verification.interactiveChecks` is empty array. EndFeatureRun shows `validatorsPassed: true`.

summary: Implementation adds Comparison section to sidebar correctly. All five sections present. Nav header configured with logo and GitHub link. Mobile toggle handled by VitePress. Code review passes with no blocking issues. However, the worker skipped the required interactive UI verification steps (docs:dev + browser checks) specified in the skill procedure, relying solely on build success.
